name: AI2SQL
description: Generate, explain, optimize and fix SQL queries from natural language. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Snowflake, Oracle, and SQLite.

tools.name: explain_sql
tools.description: Explain a SQL query in plain English

tools.name: optimize_sql
tools.description: Optimize a SQL query for performance

tools.name: fix_sql_error
tools.description: Fix a broken SQL query from error message
